headline: 3 Reasons We’re Fans of ConocoPhillips (COP)
summary: Over the past six months, ConocoPhillips has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 17.1%. Its stock price has climbed to $117.57, representing a healthy 28.1% increase. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
